name: White Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown the ground turkey with the garlic and onions.
2. Drain off any excess fat.
3. Transfer the turkey mixture to a stock pot over medium heat.
4. Gradually add the remaining ingredients (oregano through sugar) and stir until the flour is smooth and well-cooked.
5. Add the chicken broth and stir until the mixture thickens.
6. Continue cooking for 1 hour, stirring occasionally, until all flavors are well combined.
